reforms.description: The Flemish Community has prioritized transforming knowledge developed at universities into applicable technologies for industry, enhancing cooperation between universities and companies.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing cooperation between universities and industry is expected to lead to increased innovation and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The reform has been put into practice, enhancing university-industry collaboration.
reforms.importance_rationale: This initiative significantly enhances the collaboration between academia and industry, which is crucial for innovation.
reforms.source_quote: One of the main objectives of the Flemish Community has been to transform more quickly and effectively the knowledge developed at universities into technologies that can be used in industry.

reforms.description: The Brussels-Capital Region and the Walloon Region have allocated their budgets to support technological and industrial research, promoting collaborative research between public and private sectors to enhance regional know-how and innovation.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By directing funds towards technological R&D, the initiative aims to improve processes, products, and services, thereby fostering economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: Both regions have actively allocated budgets to support R&D initiatives.
reforms.importance_rationale: The allocation of regional budgets for R&D represents a significant commitment to enhancing innovation capabilities.
reforms.source_quote: The budget in this area has been essentially devoted to support technological and industrial research and, more recently, the diffusion of technology.

reforms.description: Belgium has recognized the need to improve the financial infrastructure that supports the commercialization of private research, which is crucial for enhancing innovation and R&D.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Improving financial infrastructure is expected to facilitate the commercialization of research, leading to increased innovation and economic activity.
reforms.status_evidence: The need for improvement has been officially recognized, and plans are in place to enhance the financial infrastructure.
reforms.importance_rationale: This recognition and subsequent actions represent a significant step towards enhancing the commercialization of research.
reforms.source_quote: Improving the financial infrastructure which supports the commercialisation of private research may be a crucial condition for enhancing innovation and R&D.

reforms.description: Belgium enacted a new competition law in 1993 that aligns closely with European Union law, aiming to strengthen competition by prohibiting restrictive agreements and abuse of dominant positions.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Strengthening competition is expected to foster innovation and efficiency in the market.
reforms.status_evidence: The law has been enacted and is currently in force.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a major overhaul of competition law, significantly impacting the innovation landscape.
reforms.source_quote: The new competition law aims at strengthening competition and aligns Belgian arrangements very closely with European Union law.

reforms.description: Belgium has implemented the EU Diplomas Directive, allowing for the full integration of professionals from other EU states into Belgian professions upon recognition of their home state qualifications.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Facilitating the integration of skilled professionals is expected to enhance the talent pool and contribute to innovation.
reforms.status_evidence: The directive has been fully integrated into Belgian law.
reforms.importance_rationale: This implementation represents a significant step towards enhancing the skilled workforce in Belgium.
reforms.source_quote: In May 1996, Belgium implemented the EU Diplomas Directive, providing for the full integration of a professional from another EU state into the profession in Belgium, upon the recognition of the home state qualifications.

reforms.description: Belgium has taken steps to liberalize entry conditions in the distribution sector, addressing restrictive regulations that impede new shop establishments.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Liberalizing entry conditions is expected to encourage new business establishments and enhance competition.
reforms.status_evidence: The steps taken have been officially announced, indicating a move towards liberalization.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant change in the regulatory environment for new businesses.
reforms.source_quote: The distribution sector would benefit from significant liberalisation of entry conditions.
